notes: Manifest declared SPEC (authoritative). Document contains explicit 'Locked Decisions' table (D1–D7) with ADR-like trade-off rationale, plus data-model schemas, endpoint references, and phase decomposition — fits SPEC (contracts/data models) classification. ADR-style decisions are embedded; synthesizer may want to surface D1–D7 as constraints. Status header reads 'Approved (design)' but file is not a single-decision ADR. No explicit markdown cross-references to other docs found in body.
summary: Cross-repo design re-architecting GRUVAX from direct-DB reads to discogsography's HTTP API with scoped PATs, per-profile collection caching, and RPi-to-profile device binding.
title: GRUVAX v2.0 — Multi-User Collections via discogsography API
